scripts.dev:backend: bun run migrate:dev && bun run serve:backend
scripts.migrate:dev: mkdir -p backend/var && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/tutoring-platform-uv-cache uv run --project backend alembic -c backend/alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.serve:e2e:frontend: bun run --cwd frontend build && bun run --cwd frontend preview --host 127.0.0.1 --port ${E2E_FRONTEND_PORT:-7410}
scripts.serve:frontend: bun run --cwd frontend build && bun run --cwd frontend preview --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7310
scripts.setup: bun install --frozen-lockfile && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/tutoring-platform-uv-cache uv sync --project backend --locked --group test
scripts.test: bun run test:backend && bun run test:e2e
scripts.test:backend: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/tutoring-platform-uv-cache uv run --project backend --group test pytest backend/tests
